title: cyperus globosus f. pauperior
intro: Cyperus globosus f. pauperior, also known as the globe sedge, is a type of plant species in the sedge family (Cyperaceae) characterized by its unique spherical stems and flat leaves. The medicinal properties of Cyperus globosus f. pauperior include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to promote health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Cyperus globosus f. pauperior can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
